evals.prompt: Look up BETC-Downright Smashing-Schiller for 18+ 3.0 and create a scouting report
evals.expected_output: Full roster (≈18 players with DRs and C/S), 3 completed match tables with both team lineups and C/S next to every name, wildcards flagged, strategy section with per-court notes.
pass_criteria: Output file exists under reports/ with a date-stamped filename
Roster table has ≥10 rows sorted by DR descending
At least one self-rated (S) player is flagged with ⚠ and shown as (S)
Wildcards (roster players absent from completed matches) are shaded yellow and labeled ★
Strategy section lists all five courts S1, S2, D1, D2, D3

evals.prompt: Look up ETC-Fresh off the Court-Zhu/Walsh for 18+ 3.5 and make a scouting report
evals.expected_output: Full roster with DRs and C/S, all completed match tables with both teams court by court, not-yet-played players flagged, strategy notes.
pass_criteria: Output file exists under reports/
Each per-match table shows all five courts
No player name renders as a raw URL fragment or 'None'
Filename contains the league level (e.g. 3_5) and current date

evals.prompt: Scout the team 'Smashville' for 40+ 4.0 — there are multiple teams with that name across leagues.
evals.expected_output: Skill detects the multi-league ambiguity, tries &s=1..3, and picks the team whose page shows the 40+ 4.0 league. If still ambiguous, asks the user to confirm.
pass_criteria: Skill does not silently generate a report from the wrong league
Final report's league/format matches the requested 40+ 4.0
If ambiguous, user is asked via AskUserQuestion with a distinct option per candidate

evals.prompt: Scout 'Courtside Rebels' for 18+ 3.5 — the team has zero completed matches this season.
evals.expected_output: Roster-only report with an explicit note that there are no completed matches yet and every player is effectively a wildcard.
pass_criteria: Report generates successfully despite zero matches
Report contains a visible note: 'No completed matches yet — every roster player is currently treated as a wildcard.'
All roster players are flagged as ★ NOT YET PLAYED

evals.prompt: Scout team 'Kapo'oloku Hālau' for 18+ 3.0 — team name contains diacritics and special characters.
evals.expected_output: Team URL is correctly URL-encoded, page loads, and the report is produced. Player name matching between roster and match pages handles diacritics via normalization fallback.
pass_criteria: Team URL encodes the apostrophe and diacritic correctly (no 404)
Wildcards list matches hand-verified roster minus match participants
No player appears twice in the roster table due to diacritic mismatches

evals.prompt: Scout 'Team That Does Not Exist 9999' for 18+ 3.0.
evals.expected_output: Team URL returns 404 across &s=1..3. Skill reports the failure, does not fabricate a roster, and does not write a .docx.
pass_criteria: No .docx file is written to reports/
User-facing message explains the team was not found and suggests confirming the name/year
Skill does not hang or retry indefinitely

evals.prompt: What's Jane Zhu's dynamic rating trend over the past year?
evals.expected_output: usta-team-scout should NOT trigger — this is a single-player lookup. The player-scout skill should handle it instead.
pass_criteria: usta-team-scout is not activated
The request is routed to player-scout (or the user is redirected there)

evals.prompt: Scout 'Phoenix Courtcrashers' — one of their matches this season was a forfeit on D3.
evals.expected_output: Match table for the forfeit shows D3 as FORFEIT, no fabricated opponent names, and the match is still counted toward the opponent's win total.
pass_criteria: D3 row for the forfeit match contains 'FORFEIT' in the result cell
No opponent player name is fabricated for the forfeit court
Season record in the title block reflects the forfeit correctly

evals.prompt: Scout BETC-Downright Smashing-Schiller and merge a recent match that is not yet on TennisRecord.
evals.expected_output: The generated report includes the manual match alongside scraped matches, updates affected roster records, and reflects the added sample in the strategy section.
pass_criteria: Report generates successfully with --manual-matches
Completed match count increases by the number of manual matches provided
At least one roster player's season or local record changes to reflect the manual result
Strategy section text changes to incorporate the added manual sample
